_comment: Model per phase (plans/harness_plan.md §3). Deterministic — no in-prompt model choices. Opus stages pinned to claude-opus-4-8 explicitly (2026-06-11: the bare 'opus' tier alias is ambiguous now that 'fable' exists as a separate top-tier alias, and a fable-routed run burned the session limit). decompose only expands acceptance criteria, so it runs on sonnet (GH-63). observe_triage is a cheap sonnet pre-pass over the same observe prompt; run_observer only escalates to the opus 'observe' pass when triage classifies the failure as harness-level (GH-63).
